test_cases.title: [POS] CATEGORY = 'F' migrato come feature long-form
test_cases.description: matrix_row_id: A-001 | entity: GENERAL_DATA | field: CATEGORY | verifica POS lookup F
test_cases.preconditions: Tabella Opere vuota; batch GENERAL_DATA pronto

steps.action: Inserisce riga CSV con CATEGORY='F' e tutti gli altri mandatory validi
steps.expected_result: Il batch consuma la riga senza scrivere in DLQ
Item DynamoDB creato con attributo CATEGORY='F'

test_cases.title: [POS] CATEGORY = 'S' migrato come single short-form
test_cases.description: matrix_row_id: A-002 | entity: GENERAL_DATA | field: CATEGORY | verifica POS lookup S

test_cases.title: [POS] CATEGORY = null accettato (non classificato)
test_cases.description: matrix_row_id: A-003 | entity: GENERAL_DATA | field: CATEGORY | verifica POS lookup null

test_cases.title: [NEG] CATEGORY = 'X' fuori lookup -> DLQ
test_cases.description: matrix_row_id: A-004 | entity: GENERAL_DATA | field: CATEGORY | verifica NEG lookup violato X

steps.expected_result: 1 messaggio in DLQ con motivo 'lookup violato CATEGORY'

test_cases.description: matrix_row_id: A-006 | entity: GENERAL_DATA | field: EVERGREEN | verifica POS false

test_cases.description: matrix_row_id: A-007 | entity: GENERAL_DATA | field: EVERGREEN | verifica NEG non-boolean

test_cases.title: [POS] DURATION = 180 accettato
test_cases.description: matrix_row_id: A-008 | entity: GENERAL_DATA | field: DURATION | verifica POS intero >=0

test_cases.title: [NEG] DURATION = -1 negativo -> DLQ
test_cases.description: matrix_row_id: A-009 | entity: GENERAL_DATA | field: DURATION | verifica NEG valore negativo

test_cases.title: [NEG] DURATION mancante (mandatory missing) -> DLQ
test_cases.description: matrix_row_id: A-010 | entity: GENERAL_DATA | field: DURATION | verifica NEG missing mandatory

steps.action: Inserisce CSV senza colonna DURATION o vuota

steps.expected_result: 1 messaggio con motivo 'RELEASE_DATE formato non ISO8601'

test_cases.description: matrix_row_id: A-015 | entity: GENERAL_DATA | field: RELEASE_DATE | verifica EDGE boundary 1900-01-01
